title: PMKit Task Graph
description: Source of truth for a project's task DAG. The runner topo-sorts this; render_graph turns it into a mermaid PNG for review.

id.description: Stable task id, e.g. "001". Identity only — NOT execution order.

name.description: Short kebab-case name; used in file names.

file.description: Path to the task spec, e.g. agents/tasks/001-setup-environment.md

deps.description: Task ids that must finish (status: success) before this one starts. Empty = root.

model.description: Optional model override for this task's worker, e.g. "claude-sonnet-4-6". Omit to use the runner's default.

effort.description: Optional effort/reasoning depth for this task's worker. Omit to use the runner's default.
